creator: konstantin.ashaev@gmail.com
text:
I use Remmina (1.2.0.r.24) to RDP in Windows hosts and virtual machines. On FreeBSD (11.1) I came across the issue with connecting to VMs (running in Hyper-V). I can connect to Windows hosts, but when I need VMs, it fails.
Launching Remmina in the console bring the following output:
Illegal instruction (core dumped).
